chapter_title: Decide if you need a service
snippet: A best practice approach to setting up an Outside School Hours Care (OSHC) service. There are 6 steps you should take: Although this is set out as a progressive process, in practice the process can be flexible, and some steps may be considered at the same time or in a different sequence. For example, venue availability may influence the feasibility of establishing an OSHC service and therefore also the conduct of a needs analysis. Forming a working group enables your school council to delegate the initial scoping work for an OSHC services to a dedicated group that reports back to your school council for decision making. The working group members may include parents, school councillors and teachers.
